name: PER_CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES_VL
query: SELECT B.CHECKLIST_CATEGORY_ID, B.CATEGORY_CODE, B.CATEGORY_TYPE, B.SUB_CATEGORY_ALLOWED, B.SUBJECT_TYPE_CODE, B.PARENT_CATEGORY_CODE, B.ENABLED_FLAG, B.TAG, T.NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.SEED_DATA_SOURCE, B.MODULE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES_B B, PER_CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES_TL T WHERE B.CHECKLIST_CATEGORY_ID = T.CHECKLIST_CATEGORY_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
